main.name: Eriette of the Charmed Apple
main.oracle_text:
Each creature that's enchanted by an Aura you control can't attack you or planeswalkers you control.
At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the number of Auras you control.

Enchant creature

tokens.flavor_text:
"Whatever is wrong in the Shire, Lotho will be at the bottom of it: you can be sure of that."
—Pippin

tokens.name: Nurgle's Rot
tokens.oracle_text:
Enchant creature an opponent controls
When enchanted creature dies, return this card to its owner's hand and you create a 1/3 black Demon creature token named Plaguebearer of Nurgle.
tokens.flavor_text: Each plaguebearer is formed from the blighted soul of a mortal slain by Nurgle's Rot.

tokens.name: Perforator Crocodile
tokens.oracle_text:
When Perforator Crocodile enters, for each creature your opponents control, conjure a card named Stab Wound onto the battlefield attached to that creature.
Cycling {1}{B}

tokens.name: Smothering Tithe
tokens.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent draws a card, that player may pay {2}. If the player doesn't, you create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

tokens.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
tokens.name: The One Ring
tokens.oracle_text:
Indestructible
When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

tokens.name: Tome of the Infinite
tokens.oracle_text: {U}, {T}: Conjure a random card from Tome of the Infinite's spellbook into your hand. It perpetually gains "You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast this spell."

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
tokens.flavor_text: The tower guards eventually gave up, figuring it was better at the job anyway.

Enchant creature
